title: trichodesma zeylanicum
intro: Trichodesma zeylanicum, also known as the Ceylonese bugloss or Trichodesma, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka and India, belonging to the Boraginaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant's leaves, roots, and flowers are used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Trichodesma zeylanicum include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules for therapeutic purposes.
